summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Kedorion website new features - ProjectDetailModal, ResearchLogModal, and Jobs 'More' button functionality. Backend APIs fully operational, core frontend features working correctly with minor modal close button positioning issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Close buttons positioned outside viewport, cannot be clicked normally
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can close modals by clicking outside modal area or pressing ESC key

passed_tests: Backend API health check - 100% success rate (10/10 tests passed)
'View Blueprint' button opens ProjectDetailModal with images, video placeholder, features, tech specs, gallery
Research Log cards open ResearchLogModal with images, video placeholder, content sections, gallery
Jobs section shows 2 jobs initially with correct titles
'Show 2 More Positions' button expands to show all 4 jobs correctly
'Show Less' button collapses back to 2 jobs successfully
Status text displays 'Showing 2 of 4 positions' correctly
Job titles and content display properly in all states
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal close button positioning issue - buttons are outside viewport and cannot be clicked. Ensure close buttons are properly positioned within modal bounds and clickable.
